title: Moving Average
description: Compute a rolling (moving) average of a time series of numeric values. For each position, compute the average of the current and previous w-1 values. Positions where a full window is not yet available (the first w-1 positions) should be represented as None.
constraints: Values are numeric, one per line
If the input has only one value and w=1, return [value as float]

examples.explanation: With w=3: indices 0 and 1 have fewer than 3 values so they are None. Index 2: (10+20+30)/3=20.0. Index 3: (20+30+40)/3=30.0. Index 4: (30+40+50)/3=40.0.

starter_code.python:

    pass

test_cases.description: Five values with window=3, first two are None
Single value with w=1 returns [value as float]
Four values with w=2, first is None
